title: MS-01 Gmail ingestion - operator OAuth + email in context slice
body:
**Acceptance**
- Operator runs `gmail_oauth_setup.py` and sets Portainer env (`GMAIL_CLIENT_ID`, `GMAIL_CLIENT_SECRET`, `GMAIL_REFRESH_TOKEN`).
- First sync on notcoolio: `gmail_sync.py --max-pages 2` then incremental.
- `/health/gmail-index` shows non-zero counts after sync.
- `digest` / `reflect` context slice includes recent email lines (subject, from, snippet).
- Tests cover email topic filter in context slice.

**Refs:** `docs/gmail-ingestion.md`

title: MS-02 WorkFlowy reverse sync - WF children -> Postgres
body:
**Acceptance**
- Scheduled or on-demand job reads children of each `tasks.workflowy_node_id`.
- Skips system prefixes (`id:`, `source:`, `due:`, `status:`).
- Upserts human bullets into `task_context_items` (source=workflowy).
- Context slice includes `task_context_items` for LLM digest/reflect.

**Note:** Low manual WF edit expected; still needed so WF edits and monsoon pushes share one atlas.

**Refs:** `docs/workflowy-mirror.md`

title: MS-03 Scheduled background jobs
body:
**Acceptance**
- APScheduler in app lifespan (or documented cron) runs:
  - Gmail incremental sync every 15 min when configured.
  - WA delta backfill nightly (pilot caps until volume hardening).
  - Optional morning digest outbound (depends MS-04 for reminders pattern).
- Jobs idempotent; safe across container restart.
- `/health/ready` or new `/health/scheduler` reports last run times.

**Refs:** `docs/gmail-ingestion.md`, `docs/whatsapp-backfill.md`

title: MS-04 Reminder scheduler - remind_at -> WhatsApp
body:
**Acceptance**
- Poll tasks where `remind_at <= now` and status not done.
- Send WAHA outbound; mark reminded (idempotent — no duplicate on restart).
- Optional WF child `[reminder sent] …`.
- `snooze` deferred to MS-08.

**Refs:** `project-manifest.md` success criteria

title: MS-05 Context slice v2 — task follow-ups in bundle
body:
**Acceptance**
- Include `task_context_items` (notes, research, links) per open task in context slice.
- Char budget respects new section.
- Digest/reflect can reference accumulated task research without re-pasting.

**Depends:** MS-01 for cross-source; pairs with MS-02.

title: MS-06 Auto-link ambient capture to open tasks
body:
**Acceptance**
- After free-text capture or reflect, LLM scores match against open tasks.
- Above threshold -> `push_context_item()` + WF child without manual `note <id>`.
- Example: Pondicherry research → task *Book hotel in White Town*.

**Depends:** MS-05.

title: MS-07 Active task context (`on <id>`)
body:
**Acceptance**
- `on 18` sets active task for session/user until cleared.
- Ambient messages append to active task context (WF + DB).
- `reflect` prefers active task context when set.

title: MS-08 Snooze and reschedule
body:
**Acceptance**
- `snooze 18 2h` / `snooze 18 tomorrow` updates `remind_at`.
- Confirmation via WhatsApp.

**Depends:** MS-04.
